stemHtml: Assuming cabin differential pressure has reached the required value in normal flight conditions, if flight altitude and air-conditioning system setting are maintained the…

options.a: outflow valves will move to the fully closed position.
options.b: pressurisation system ceases to function until leakage reduces the pressure.
options.c: mass air flow through the cabin is constant.
options.d: outflow valves will move to the fully open position.
